# project-summary-high-level-simple

## Overview

- Provide a clear, high-level summary of the project
- Focus on purpose, scope, and impact
- Written for both technical and non-technical readers

## Project Name

- Include clear project title
- Add version or date if applicable

## Purpose

- Define the main objective
- Identify the problem being solved
- State expected value or impact

## Scope

- In Scope
  - Key features or systems included
- Out of Scope
  - What is excluded

## Key Changes

- Group updates into categories
  - Configuration changes
  - Feature enhancements
  - Bug fixes
- Describe impact in simple terms

## Dependencies

- List required systems, tools, or integrations

## Assumptions

- Define expected conditions or environment

## Risks

- Highlight potential issues or limitations

## Validation

- High-level testing approach
  - Functional checks
  - Regression coverage

## Outcome

- Expected result after implementation
- Alignment with project purpose

## Notes

- Keep entries concise
- Use consistent terminology
- Avoid vague wording

## Goal

- Define the primary objective clearly.

## Input

- [SOURCE_TEXT]
- [TARGET_FILE]
- [CONTEXT]

## Constraints

- Be explicit and deterministic.
- Do not assume missing facts.

## Expected Output

- Format: bullet list
- Include actionable results
